programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Angels host the New York Mets to open a three-game weekend interleague series at Angel Stadium. Entering the series, both teams have struggled early in the season, with the Angels looking to bounce back from a difficult stretch.

programme.title: The American Bible Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants from Dallas, Chicago, and Pasadena, Calif.

programme.sub-title: I Always Wanted a Shaved Monkey
programme.desc: When Charlie and Alan take their personal frustrations out on each other, Rose tries to help the brothers sort out their feelings.

programme.desc: Sheldon is required to attend Sunday school, but when he returns he decides to learn all he can about a multitude of religions.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob makes things worse after interfering in Goodwin and Kofo's ongoing spat; Abishola puts her pride on the line when she realizes she's been an inattentive friend to Kemi.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: In order to take her mind off of her heartbreak, Erica takes a trip to Los Angeles to see her best friend; after getting caught taking part in an underground poker game, Adam gets sentenced to Pop-Pop duty, which turns out better than expected.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: 9/11 Survivors Speak Up
programme.desc: Hear from survivors, first responders and advocates about the devastating impact of 9/11 toxins and the lifetime benefits available; learning about your rights and protection under the law.

programme.title: NASCAR Countdown Live
programme.desc: A pre-race lead-up to NASCAR racing.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series
programme.desc: Drivers battle for 200 laps at Texas Motor Speedway. Justin Allgaier seeks his third win of the campaign at the 1.5-mile quad-oval. Toyota looks to reclaim dominance at the venue, while Jesse Love leads the rookie of the year race.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Stephen Hawking comes to lecture at the university for a week, Wolowitz is given the task of maintaining his wheelchair, making Sheldon green with envy.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph Kramden is a perpetually flustered but eternally optimistic New York City bus driver living with his wife, Alice, in a small Brooklyn apartment. Ralph's best friend is sanitation worker Ed Norton, who lives in the same building with wife Trixie.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Jack Hibbs
programme.desc: Real Life Ministry's Pastor Jack Hibbs proclaims Biblical truth impacting culture, with a clear understanding of God's word.

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality.

programme.title: The Hill Sunday With Chris Stirewalt
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of politicians and newsmakers discussing the latest political news from the nation's capital.

programme.title: Car Repair Secrets!
programme.desc: Save thousands on car repairs.

programme.desc: Staying informed with the news and headlines.

programme.title: How to Build a Rock Solid Retirement
programme.desc: Learn the top 3 retirement mistakes people are making and how to fix them.

programme.title: Police 24/7: On the Beat
programme.desc: A motorcycle thief bails and runs inside a nearby house; a headlight violation leads to a surprising find; a hit-and-run victim takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.
